SL Forensics

Americor Client Services · intraday SL by queue · Jun 2026

Intraday decomposition

Bars = calls offered per 30-min. Line = achieved SL%. Click any interval to see why it broke.

Month SL heatmap

Every day × every 30-min window. Find the times SL recurs red — vertical red stripes are structural, not one-offs.

≥90% 75-90% <75% low volume / closed

Staffing & shrinkage drag

Forecast vs scheduled hours (IB skill) and projected SL before/after shrinkage. The gap between the two PSL lines is service level lost to people not being available when scheduled.

Behavioral watch list

Agents flagged on handle behavior within the selected queue (calls/AHT/hold from call-level data). Not-ready% is the agent's all-queue daily figure. Click a header to sort.

This is month-to-date handle behavior (long handlers, hold abuse) from call-level data. For who went off-phone exactly when SL broke — availability during this queue's weak window, plus repeat patterns and trends — see the Agents tab, now powered by the Agent State Detail export.

Priority fixes

Sources: ALL_QUEUES (call-level ACD, 24 days) · Forecast vs Scheduled · Agent Occupancy · Agent State Detail (2.5M state events) · CS Staffing roster
SL% = calls meeting threshold / offered · abandon% = abandoned / offered · AHT from answered calls · data baked in; swap the export set to refresh.
×

Manager · refresh data

Enter manager PIN

Pull these from Five9 / Calabrio for the date range you want, then drop them in. Only these are needed — the dashboard ignores everything else.

1 · Queue / ACD export (call-level)required
Five9 reporting → the ALL QUEUES call-detail report, one row per call. Must include the columns DATE HALF HOUR SKILL ABANDONED SERVICE LEVEL HANDLE TIME HOLD TIME SPEED OF ANSWER AGENT NAME CALL ID. This drives every SL, abandon, AHT, interval and watch-list number. Drop one or more .csv files (split exports are fine — they merge).
drop .csv file(s) or click to browse
2 · Forecast Skill vs Scheduledrequired
Calabrio → Forecast Skill vs Scheduled export (.xlsx). Per skill × day, with Forecasted Time incl. Shrinkage Scheduled Time PSL (%) PSL incl Shrinkage (%). Drives the staffing gap and the shrinkage-drag lines.
drop .xlsx file or click to browse
3 · Agent Occupancyoptional
Five9 → Agent Occupancy (.xlsx), per agent × day with LOGIN TIME and NOT READY TIME. Only lights up the High not-ready flag on the watch list. Skip it and everything else still works.
drop .xlsx file or click to browse
